file: 1061_Lin 等 - 2020 - The production of bio-jet fuel from palm oil derived alkanes.txt

experiments.description: 将棕榈油衍生的加氢处理烷烃（柴油范围）在NiAg/SAPO-11催化剂上转化为喷气燃料范围的产品。研究了温度、压力、液时空速(LHSV)对碳数分布、异构体与正构烷烃比率(I-to-N)和芳烃含量的影响。
experiments.text_snippet: The hydro-processed alkanes, in this paper, were turned into jet fuel range products through hydro-cracking/isomerization over the nickel-silver (NiAg) supported on silico-aluminio-phosphates (SAPO-11) catalyst... The effects of the reaction parameters such as temperature, pressure, and liquid hourly space velocity (LHSV) on the carbon distributions, isomer-to-normal (I-to-N) alkane ratios and aromatics contents were investigated

Feedstock.value: Palm oil derived hydro-processed alkanes (diesel range)
Feedstock.original: Palm oil derived hydro-processed alkanes (diesel range)

Catalyst composition.original: 25 wt% Ni, Ni/Ag molar ratio = 44, supported on SAPO-11 (SiO₂)₂₀.₆(Al₂O₃)₅₁(P₂O₅)₄₃

Product Selectivity.original: Isomer selectivity increased with temperature up to 360°C

Catalyst stability.value: Reduced metal dispersion observed in spent catalyst
Catalyst stability.original: Reduced metal dispersion observed in spent catalyst
